'''harogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycelium|mycelium]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycelium|mycelium]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| harogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæregeth|hæregeth]] || [[word:hæregej|hæregej]] || [[word:hæregesh|hæregesh]] || [[word:hærege|hærege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:harorogoth|harorogoth]] || [[word:harorogoj|harorogoj]] || [[word:harorogosh|harorogosh]] || [[word:harorogo|harorogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:harogoth|harogoth]] || [[word:harogoj|harogoj]] || [[word:harogosh|harogosh]] || [[word:harogo|harogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:harofgoth|harofgoth]] || [[word:harofgoj|harofgoj]] || [[word:harofgosh|harofgosh]] || [[word:harofgof|harofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:harogotho|harogotho]] || [[word:harogojo|harogojo]] || [[word:harogosho|harogosho]] || [[word:harogoko|harogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:harogoth|harogoth]] || [[word:harogoj|harogoj]] || [[word:harogosh|harogosh]] || [[word:harogo|harogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:harogothol|harogothol]] || [[word:harogojol|harogojol]] || [[word:harogoshol|harogoshol]] || [[word:harogokol|harogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:harogothotho|harogothotho]] || [[word:harogojojo|harogojojo]] || [[word:harogoshosho|harogoshosho]] || [[word:harogoko|harogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:harogothon|harogothon]] || [[word:harogojon|harogojon]] || [[word:harogoshon|harogoshon]] || [[word:harogokon|harogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:harogothoro|harogothoro]] || [[word:harogojoro|harogojoro]] || [[word:harogoshoro|harogoshoro]] || [[word:harogokoro|harogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
